sections.paragraph:
στεῦμαι
Etym. used by Hom. only in 3rd sg. pres. and imperf. στεῦται, στεῦτο, and once by Aesch. in 3rd pl. στεῦνται

Dep., to make as if one would, to promise or threaten that one will, Il.; also with aor. inf., στεῦται ἀκοῦσαι Od.; so, στεῦται ἀμφιβαλεῖν Aesch.: —absol., στεῦτο he made eager efforts, Od.


Etym. deriv. uncertain
